diagnoses.name: Alcoholic cirrhosis of liver with ascites
diagnoses.evidence_span: complex medical history including alcoholic cirrhosis of the liver with ascites

diagnoses.name: Alcohol-induced acute pancreatitis without necrosis or infection
diagnoses.evidence_span: alcohol-induced acute pancreatitis without necrosis or infection

diagnoses.name: Hepatic failure without coma
diagnoses.evidence_span: Laboratory evaluation revealed markedly elevated transaminases, elevated bilirubin consistent with hepatic failure without coma

diagnoses.name: Acute kidney failure
diagnoses.evidence_span: acute kidney failure superimposed on stage 4 chronic kidney disease

diagnoses.name: Chronic kidney disease, stage 4
diagnoses.evidence_span: acute kidney failure superimposed on stage 4 chronic kidney disease

diagnoses.name: Secondary esophageal varices without bleeding
diagnoses.evidence_span: secondary esophageal varices without active bleeding on upper endoscopy

diagnoses.name: Hepatopulmonary syndrome
diagnoses.evidence_span: he manifested signs of hepatopulmonary syndrome with dyspnea and hypoxemia

diagnoses.name: Severe protein-calorie malnutrition
diagnoses.evidence_span: Severe protein-calorie malnutrition was evident from anthropometric and laboratory data

diagnoses.name: Pneumonia of unspecified organism
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient developed pneumonia of unspecified organism during hospitalization

diagnoses.name: Hypoxemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: vital signs showed hypoxemia with oxygen saturation of 88% on room air

diagnoses.name: Active alcohol dependence
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient has active alcohol dependence

diagnoses.name: Ascorbic acid deficiency
diagnoses.evidence_span: vitamin supplementation (thiamine, pyridoxine, folic acid, cyanocobalamin, ascorbic acid, vitamin E, and vitamin D) addressing malnutrition and known deficiencies from chronic liver disease

procedures.name: Diagnostic paracentesis
procedures.evidence_span: Diagnostic paracentesis was performed percutaneously on multiple occasions

procedures.name: Therapeutic paracentesis
procedures.evidence_span: A second drainage was performed for therapeutic purposes

procedures.name: Upper endoscopy
procedures.evidence_span: Upper endoscopic inspection of the intestinal tract was completed, confirming secondary esophageal varices without hemorrhage

procedures.name: Jejunal feeding tube placement
procedures.evidence_span: a jejunal feeding tube was placed endoscopically via natural opening

procedures.name: Central venous catheter insertion
procedures.evidence_span: A central line was inserted into the right atrium percutaneously

procedures.name: Intermittent hemodialysis
procedures.evidence_span: Intermittent dialysis (less than 6 hours per day) was initiated

chief_complaint: Altered mental status and abdominal pain.
